chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 774 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 04.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant files a statement along with certified copy of the order dated 22.10.2025, as passed by learned Ist Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Ubauro in Criminal Case No.198/2025, contending that the applicant is having been acquitted in the offence, bail application be disposed of as not pressed. Ordered accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
